gates.title: no token leak in reports/notebooks/git
gates.blocking_for_v3: Real secret-value leaks = 0 across 58 files; git-history matches are doc placeholders only.

gates.title: every benchmark_passed row has valid current-run evidence
gates.blocking_for_v3: STRUCTURAL GAP (the v3.0.0 blocker): the reconciler does not durably attribute current-run evidence to all healthy rows. After RUN_ALL: 19 benchmark_passed rows have a NaN evidence_artifact (metric_origin=current_rerun but no pointer) and ~13 healthy rows (deimv2-*, rfdetr-seg-large, rtdetrv4-*, florence-2-*) carry legitimate historical_validated evidence (v235-v238) rather than a current-run artifact. The project's own test_v243 invariants (healthy rows use current-run artifacts) therefore remain unmet for ~91 rows.
gates.remediation: Enhance the reconciler to attribute each task's current-run leaderboard (e.g. 01_object_detection/reports/detection_leaderboard.csv under the active RUN_ID) to every model it benchmarks, so benchmark_passed rows carry a current-run evidence_artifact.

gates.title: classic smart tools separated from model leaderboard
gates.blocking_for_v3: smart_tool_coverage_ledger.csv (8 classic tools) is separate from model_coverage_ledger.csv; no classic tool in the model ledger.

gates.title: final_winners schema does not mix core/restricted
gates.blocking_for_v3: final_winners.json separates *_core_winner from *_external_restricted_baseline_winner. v3-prep FIXED a commercial-safety bug: EdgeSAM (S-Lab non-commercial) was the computed promptable CORE winner; _compute_final_winners is now default_safe-aware, so the core promptable winner is efficientsam (Apache-2.0) and EdgeSAM is the external baseline. Durable through RUN_ALL.

gates.title: package tests pass
gates.blocking_for_v3: ~12 stale tests fixed (edgesam license + ext-count, yolo9 MIT, oneformer/deim wired, final_winners v3 schema, swinv2 benchmark_passed, CSV/JSON sync, libreyolo-seg exception, clean-outputs, OBB). New smart_annotation: 15/15. Touched-module sweep: 278 passed; test_v243(4) structural V3-11 + dev-box(2); smart_annotation 15/15; RUN_ALL 0-error. REMAINING: test_v243 (4 tests) — the structural V3-11 evidence-attribution gap (healthy rows use historical_validated, not current-run, artifacts); plus dev-box-only failures (test_v200/test_v260: torchreid/deimv2 installed locally) that pass in clean CI.
gates.remediation: Close V3-11 (reconciler current-run evidence attribution) -> test_v243 goes green.
